raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"device_choice","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"I'm planning to buy a laptop from the university's bookstore.","distilled_fact":"The user is planning to buy a laptop from the university's bookstore."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"A laptop is a popular choice for university students, and it's often a good idea to get one.","distilled_fact":"A laptop is often a good idea for university students."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"device_comparison","confidence":0.79,"matched_text":"If your course requires specific software or hardware that's not compatible with laptops, a desktop might be a better option.","distilled_fact":"A desktop might be a better option if a course requires specific software or hardware that is not compatible with laptops."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"device_comparison","confidence":0.74,"matched_text":"Tablets can also be a more affordable option, but they might not be as versatile as a laptop.","distilled_fact":"Tablets can be a more affordable option than laptops."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"purchase_consideration","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"Check if the university bookstore offers a warranty or support services for the laptop you're purchasing.","distilled_fact":"The university bookstore may offer a warranty or support services for the laptop the user is purchasing."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"purchase_consideration","confidence":0.8,"matched_text":"If you do decide to buy a laptop from the university bookstore, be sure to check if they offer any discounts or bundles for students.","distilled_fact":"The university bookstore may offer discounts or bundles for students who buy a laptop there."}]}
